name: How is fault determined in an on-the-job accident case?
description: No-fault system for workers comp; employer not sued directly.[2]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined in an on-the-job accident case?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault system for workers comp; employer not sued directly.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers comp is no-fault; benefits paid regardless of who caused it, if work-related.[2] Context: Exclusive remedy against employer; third-party negligence allows separate suit.[1][7] Key factors: Scope of employment test; arising out of course of duties.[1][2] Practical guidance: Focus on medical proof not blame; investigate third parties. No-fault speeds benefits. Lawyer spots extra claims.
